inputs.label: Age
inputs.businessContext: Current age of the dog in complete months.

businessContext_i18n.en: Current age of the dog in complete months.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Köpeğin tam ay cinsinden mevcut yaşı.

inputs.label: Current Weight
inputs.businessContext: Current body weight of the dog in kilograms.

businessContext_i18n.en: Current body weight of the dog in kilograms.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Köpeğin kilogram cinsinden mevcut vücut ağırlığı.

inputs.label: Growth Rate Factor
inputs.businessContext: Breed-specific exponential growth rate (k). Small breeds ≈ 0.3, Medium ≈ 0.2, Large ≈ 0.15, Giant ≈ 0.1.

businessContext_i18n.en: Breed-specific exponential growth rate (k). Small breeds ≈ 0.3, Medium ≈ 0.2, Large ≈ 0.15, Giant ≈ 0.1.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Irka özgü üstel büyüme hızı (k). Küçük ırklar ≈ 0.3, Orta ≈ 0.2, Büyük ≈ 0.15, Dev ≈ 0.1.

inputs.label: Body Condition Score
inputs.businessContext: Veterinary body condition score on a 9-point scale (1 = emaciated, 5 = ideal, 9 = obese).

businessContext_i18n.en: Veterinary body condition score on a 9-point scale (1 = emaciated, 5 = ideal, 9 = obese).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Veteriner vücut kondisyon skoru 9 puanlık ölçekte (1 = zayıf, 5 = ideal, 9 = obez).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
